prompt: The status rollout in StatusEnumMigration replaces legacy free-form status strings with the versioned v1 enum catalog. Repair the migration without changing its public API or the tests. New writes must accept only canonical v1 names, reject aliases and unknown values, and dual-write the legacy status string alongside status_version and status_code. Current reads must understand both legacy strings and versioned rows. Backfill#run must scan at most limit rows in storage order, add the v1 fields to every mappable legacy row without breaking LegacyStatusReader, leave unrelated data intact, skip already-versioned rows, and report each unmappable row without rewriting it. Resume tokens are opaque: pass the store token back byte-for-byte and accept it on the next batch. Compare-and-swap writes must keep retries idempotent. The project has no third-party dependencies; `sh test/verify.sh` is the complete offline deterministic verification command.
